scene.message: Maki: Huh, {ctl07:1}? Aren't we{nl} going to the shrine?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: The "Evil-Warding{nl} Mirror" is here, right?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Still, what a{nl} terrible stench that was!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: This is like a field{nl} trip! Is there anywhere
Elly: That Demon earlier was{nl} splendid! I was quite moved.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: I'm not really into{nl} this kind of thing, but...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Me, fight that thing{nl} from before?{wait_fr:16} ...{wait_fr:21}Seriously?{waitkey}{ret}
